main_themes: Symptom vs. Problem: Thought loops aren't the problem; they are a symptom of misplaced worship.
The 'Pitcher' Analogy: Training the mind to focus on God requires repetition, not just a one-time miracle.
God's Long-Term Coaching: Current heartbreak is a training session for future high-stakes life events.
Sales as Service: Reframing business communication as finding alignment and helping others make correct decisions.
Repentance vs. Willpower: Turning away from habit-loops (Nicotine, porn) as a byproduct of finding God 'amazing.'
emotional_peaks: Austin's frustration with the 'non-stop' ADHD-fueled thought loops about his ex.
The 'Handshake Deal': Austin committing to a 6-month coaching program despite financial struggle ($25 down).
Andre's firm challenge on Austin's sales approach: 'You have to learn how to sell—not like a scammer, but as service.'
top_objections: Objection: 'I've prayed 10 times today and the thoughts still won't stop.' (The Miracle Trap)
Objection: 'I can't afford coaching right now because of my car/debt.' (The Financial Bottleck)
Objection: 'I don't know my own value/purpose at 29.' (The Identity Crisis)
top_truth_flips: Trying to stop a thought is fighting the symptom. Solving the IDOLATRY stops the symptom automatically.
God rarely performs a 'miracle' when He's busy giving you a 'training session.'
Sales isn't convincing people; it's asking the right questions so they convince themselves based on their own goals.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: Stop trying to kill the thoughts; kill the idolatry and the thoughts will starve to death.
nuggets.why_it_hits: It gives men a target they can actually hit. 'Fighting thoughts' is a losing game; 'finding God as source' is a winning one.
nuggets.proof_quote: You've been trying to stop the symptom, which means that the problem is still pouring out the symptom... solving the problem would then stop the symptom as a byproduct.

value_equation.dream_outcome: An immediate end to obsessive thought loops.
numerator_notes: Increase certainty by explaining the 'leaky faucet' mechanism.
denominator_notes: Reduce effort by giving them permission to stop 'trying' to stop the thoughts.

hook_angles: Why you can't stop thinking about her.
The hidden reason your 'thought-control' isn't working.
Stop fighting the symptoms. Kill the source of your anxiety.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: God isn't raising the dead in your life because He's too busy training you to throw a curveball.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Direct confront to the 'prayer without practice' entitlement. It uses the baseball analogy to make spiritual discipline feel like athletics.
nuggets.proof_quote: You might understand how the basic concept works, but to be dialed in with it... how do you get that? Repetition of practice. ... If he's saying no to your prayer of just making it go away, trust him. He's teaching you to move your mind the same way you've trained yourself to move your hands.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Relief from the frustration of 'unanswered' prayers.
numerator_notes: Increase outcome by framing the struggle as 'Elite Training' from God.
denominator_notes: Remove the 'mystery' of why things are hard.

hook_angles: Why God is saying 'No' to your miracle.
Your heartbreak isn't a problem; it's a practice session.
Stop asking for a snap of the fingers. Start doing the reps.

objection_bank.objection_text: I can't invest in myself (coaching/business) because I'm in debt or behind on bills.
objection_bank.underlying_belief: Money is the primary resource I need to fix my life, more than wisdom or alignment.
objection_bank.underlying_fear: If I spend this money on a 'spiritual' need, my physical needs (car, rent) will destroy me.
objection_bank.counter_truth_angle: Misalignment created the debt. Wisdom solves it. If you delay the wisdom to fix the debt, you'll just create more debt with the same brain.
objection_bank.transcript_proof_quote: I had negative money in my bank account... I spent like... six and a half grand [on coaching]... That month I made four grand. sell two people... God takes care of my bills as long as I stay focused on service.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: You can't whiteboard your way out of a thought loop; you have to cut the power at the idol.
top_5_nuggets.why: Massive psychological value for the stuck man.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: Accept your heartbreak as a training session for the man you need to become.
top_5_nuggets.why: Strong reframe of pain into purpose.

top_5_vsl_objections.why: Directly tackles the 'money first, God second' trap that keeps men broke and stuck.

preserve_phrases: Moving your mind like your hands
Adam and Eve seeing with obedience
creator_notes.tone: Athletic, strategic, and unrelenting. This call has a 'Coach on the Field' energy.
